Evidence/Request Item: SI-19 voice and video collaboration protection packet listing media encryption class SRTP settings and hardening baseline tied to supported client builds.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Packet must cite vendor Hardening Guide revision in CMDB not marketing brief.

Evidence/Request Item: AC-5 separation-of-duties matrix for IAM and change roles showing incompatible permission pairs for approve versus deploy actions on production paths.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Matrix must export from access governance tool with rule IDs not spreadsheet only.

Evidence/Request Item: PM-9 risk executive function charter naming the accountable official meeting cadence and escalation path to the authorizing official for significant risks.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Charter must be signed policy record stored in records repository not email thread.

Evidence/Request Item: AU-8 time synchronization evidence listing approved stratum-1 NTP sources monitoring of clock skew alerts and enforcement on in-scope management hosts.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Evidence must show agent config hashes matching live hosts not sample of two servers only.

Evidence/Request Item: SC-5 resource availability policy export for internet edge gateways showing connection rate limits per-source quotas and linkage to capacity monitoring dashboards.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Export must map rule IDs to WAF or load-balancer API objects not Visio only.
